response.overview: B.A.R.I.S.T.A, the Anti Radical Insurgent Terrorist Agency of Andorsia, is an intelligence agency of Andorsia, a fictional Commonwealth nation frequently involved in intelligence missions, counter-terrorism operations, and international investigations. While on a mission to eliminate K.U.R.A.P (Andorsian Southern Separatist Radical Group) which threatens to destabilize Andorsia, Agent K is kidnapped by a group of terrorists seeking to discredit the intelligence agency. To rescue Agent K, Agent M, known as a legendary spy, and Agent Gee, a nerdy IT analyst, are selected to complete this covert investigation. However, while carrying out this mission, they uncover another, more shocking conspiracy. Agent K is accused of deliberately allowing himself to be captured in order to defect from their agency.
response.title: Barista Misi Terpaling Sulit
